original_statement: at most 179.5 pts scored in this year
mutated_statement: at most 179.5 units scored in this period and also at least 180 units in this period
mutation_analysis: [Contradiction] + [Unit rename] + [Temporal scope rename]: Added contradictory lower bound (at most 179.5 → also at least 180) | "pts" → "units" | "this year" → "this period" (at most 179.5 pts scored in this year → at most 179.5 units scored in this period and also at least 180 units in this period)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据日志中的critique和judge_thought可识别关键信息：critique仅指出select_column方法使用错误（未提及指令内的上下界矛盾），而after_refine的judge_thought与chain的thought明确给出两个独立结果“179.5”和“296”并标注[Correct]。Agent的具体表现是将“at most 179.5”和“at least 180”作为两个独立查询分别执行并返回各自满足条件的值，未在任何位置识别或质疑两条约束在同一时段内互相矛盾。因此将其归类为“无法意识到指令矛盾”：代理以形式化执行为主，机械提取数据而未进行语义层面的矛盾判断或主动澄清。
